ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being listed */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was listed */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Last date the stock was traded on the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (active, delisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_listings_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_listings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the price information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Absolute price change of the stock on the given date */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage price change of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the price change information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_changes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all stocks in the industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the industry information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all stocks in the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the sector information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged into the platform */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last date the user performed an action on the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view stock data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the news article information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_trained" TEXT /* Last date the model was trained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictive insight */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model that generated the insight */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the insight */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predictive insight generated by the model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the predictive insight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the predictive insight was generated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the predictive insight information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_insights_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_insights_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_api_integrations" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external API */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the external API */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used to authenticate with the API */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret used to authenticate with the API */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the API integration was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the API integration information was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API integration (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id")
)
